name: @unlaxer/dge-toolkit
description: DGE (Dialogue-driven Gap Extraction) — 会話劇で設計の穴を発見するメソッドkit

scripts.postinstall:
node -e "console.log('
  DGE toolkit installed.
  Run: npx dge-install
  to set up dge/ and .claude/skills/ in your project.
  Run: npx dge-update
  to update existing dge/ files.
')"
